slides.headline: Stay Ahead of At-Risk Veterans
slides.body: Empower your institution to intervene early and ensure student success.

slides.headline: Identify At-Risk Veterans
slides.body: Screen student veterans for financial aid issues, mental health challenges, and academic concerns.
bullets: Use Chapter 33 to track aid eligibility
Review Yellow Ribbon eligibility and benefits

slides.headline: Create a Response Plan
slides.body: Develop tailored interventions for identified at-risk students.
bullets: Refer to SAA guidance for support

slides.headline: Implement Early Interventions
slides.body: Offer tutoring, counseling, and financial assistance to mitigate risks.
bullets: Refer to Chapter 31 for educational benefits
Utilize the 85/15 rule for financial aid
Support student veterans with Yellow Ribbon benefits

slides.headline: Monitor Progress
slides.body: Regularly check in with students to track improvements and adjust interventions.
bullets: Review MHA services for mental health support

slides.headline: Document and Report
slides.body: Maintain accurate records and report compliance to the SAA.
Learn how VASCO Assistant Pro can help you build your early warning system. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Stay ahead of at-risk student veterans with proactive early warning systems. Implement steps to identify, intervene, and monitor student success. Learn how VASCO Assistant Pro can support you. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Implement Early Interventions', as it could benefit from a more concise list of actionable steps.
